evals.name: happy-path-generate-branded-spreadsheet
evals.prompt: Generate a branded Excel spreadsheet with our company colors for Q1 sales data
evals.expected_output: A Python script using openpyxl that creates a .xlsx file with brand-compliant styling including title bar, column headers, data rows, and footer
expectations: Applies brand color fills to title bar and headers
Includes alternating row colors for data
Adds a footer with brand wordmark

evals.name: edge-case-no-brand-config
evals.prompt: Create an Excel report but I don't have a brand config file
evals.expected_output: Generates spreadsheet using neutral blue default palette with Calibri font
expectations: Falls back to default color palette

evals.name: edge-case-wide-data
evals.prompt: Build a branded XLSX with 25 columns of inventory data
evals.expected_output: Handles wide data with freeze panes and auto-fitted column widths
expectations: Freezes panes at header row and first column
Maintains brand styling across all columns

evals.name: false-positive-csv-export
evals.prompt: Export this data as a CSV file
evals.expected_output: This skill should NOT be triggered; CSV export does not require brand-xlsx styling
expectations: Skill is not invoked for CSV requests
No openpyxl or brand styling applied

evals.name: happy-path-kpi-dashboard
evals.prompt: Create a branded Excel dashboard with KPI boxes showing revenue, churn rate, and NPS
evals.expected_output: Generates XLSX with KPI boxes using brand primary fill, plus data sections below
expectations: Creates KPI boxes with label and value cells
Uses brand color fills for KPI sections
Includes section dividers between KPI and data areas
